label: Target Mapping
description: Maps the target protein (RPS6KB1) to its biological system, assay metrics, and known structure references for the drug discovery pipeline.

defaultInputs.name: Target/Protein Input
defaultInputs.tooltip: Optional protein name or description to seed the target mapping search.

defaultOutputs.name: Biological system
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Biological pathway or system the target belongs to.

defaultOutputs.name: Desired modulation
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Inhibition, activation or other required modulation.

defaultOutputs.name: Corresponding representative assay
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Representative assay used to measure activity against this target.

defaultOutputs.name: Rationale
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Scientific rationale for targeting this protein.

defaultOutputs.name: Crystallized structure
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Available crystallographic PDB entries for the target.

defaultOutputs.name: ChEMBL ID
defaultOutputs.tooltip: ChEMBL database identifier for the target.

defaultOutputs.name: FASTA
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Full amino acid FASTA sequence for the target protein.

configSchema.label: Search
configSchema.tooltip: Type a target protein name or biological effect to map.
